name: Splitsies
prize: [MLH] Most Creative Use of Twilio - HackNYU 2023
desc: After a fun dinner with your friends, it can be tedious trying to split the bill with everyone, especially if everyone got different things. Splitsies will make this task quick and easy.

name: Github Gato
desc: GitHubGato is a new and innovated way to learn and play with coding commands on GitHub.

name: Giv4Gud
desc: A mobile app that connects individuals to local shelters so they can donate their excess items to people in need.

name: ARTillery
prize: Best Arts & Crafts Hack — TechTogether HobbyHacks
desc: A cure for artist's block. Gives users a creative prompt to follow and surfaces inspiration across different styles and mediums.
